review_text: Allows people to make fun of Native Americans. I reported a comment under a post saying a Native American man should be called "Chief Slot Machine from the Casino" and the response was "this doesn't go against our guidelines." Absolutely ridiculous to allow that kind on hate on the app. The amount of racism I see on here DAILY is ridiculous and only increasing. Explains why everyone I know is using this less and less.
The app is suddenly scrolling by itself? Apparently Meta thinks we're so brain dead from their apps that we can't scroll without their help. Hate this new "feature"

The App is still a good place to showcase yourself, your work, your interests and to be inspired . It's hard to get reach now ; likes have dropped and there are too many new features that don't really help users all the time. But it's still the best place for visual content.

A problem after the latest update. I can't scroll new comments after a certain point. It simply freezes and won't load anymore. It was working fine before the update. I can read a few dozen comments at most. Very frustrating. And videos keep cutting out. There's always an issue with every single update on Instagram!

Yet again!!! Why all the sudden is the explore feed showing everything as reels. You can't see the date of when something was posted nor can u scroll and see a brief overview anymore. You have to actually click into each post then go to the page of who posted it to begin with in order to see anything. Sooo stupid. I want my casual browsing in my explore area back!!!! 😐
what has happened to the feed? Even with the algorithm adjusted to my interests, I get hardly anything I want. Having to rely on following and favourite. I'm missing out on new content!!

It's getting better, but the bugs that require uninstalling then reinstalling shouldn't be on us to fix their issues. Stop being so lazy and fix issues that are reported instead of ignoring the problem. We should be given updates, patches that address issues as they happen or shortly after. You have enough employees. Get them out of the break room and make them do their jobs. Or pay us every time we have to do an uninstall/reinstall

I completely understand that Instagram is evolving. The least they could do is send out notifications, new changes, and old features removed or replaced.

Being on Instagram is nice, you can see your other friends' photos or live videos when you can't see them in person. Different from Facebook, in a way of posting photos/videos. it would be great if Instagram had a tool where you can delete and add photos to your older posts on your account page. but the one thing I miss the most, which was my favorite use of Instagrams, was their grid reorder. Instagram isn't the same without it.Feels like starting posting your whole grid all over again

I click Explore, and the initial image of every post I click on is blurry. Never encountered that until now. Ruins the viewing. If there are additional images in its "carousel," though, then those, as you swipe left, appear in perfect definition. And if you go to the trouble of clicking on their profile and revisiting that Just Seen first image *then* it's displayed crystal clearly. But the initial view from the 🔍 page results in a low-definition/poorly pixelated-like image.
